overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player walks along a sidewalk beneath towering buildings with massive digital billboards, then turns onto a palm-tree-lined street with vibrant red neon installations.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath futuristic megastructures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward a massive digital billboard archway

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: massive overhead structure with multiple digital screens displaying advertisements including DYNALAR and Chromium Breeze
dark modern building with illuminated AVANTE signage on the facade
tall futuristic street lamp with green illuminated rings
tall skyscraper with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered urban walkway at night, with the player walking toward a massive digital billboard arch. The AVANTE building stands prominently on the right, while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in opposing directions, and a few vehicles pass on the street to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional plaza under building overhang with concrete seating

events.description: turning right to pass under the digital billboard structure into the side plaza
emerging from under the covered structure into the open plaza area with palm trees

agents.ego_description: turning right under the archway and continuing along the building's edge

entered.detail: low concrete blocks arranged along the walkway edge
tall palm trees lining the edge of the open plaza ahead

segments.scene_description: The player turns right beneath the massive digital billboard, which now looms on the left side of the frame. The scene transitions from the covered walkway to a more open plaza area with concrete barriers and palm trees becoming visible in the distance. The AVANTE building passes out of view behind the player.

scene_state.functional_zone: open boulevard with palm trees and vertical neon art installations

events.description: passing tall vertical red neon light pillars that illuminate the palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the open boulevard passing other pedestrians and neon installations

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction along the boulevard

entered.detail: tall vertical red neon light installation wrapping around palm tree trunks
large building with bright white signage visible at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto a wide open boulevard lined with palm trees wrapped in vibrant red neon lights. The massive digital billboard structure is now behind, replaced by views of distant illuminated skyscrapers. Pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, and the street opens up to reveal more of the futuristic cityscape with glass buildings on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered urban corridor into a wide, neon-lit boulevard. It begins on a covered walkway at night, moving toward a massive digital billboard arch with the AVANTE building and towering skyscrapers framing the path. As the camera turns right beneath the glowing billboard, the scene transitions from the enclosed walkway into an open plaza where concrete barriers give way to distant palm trees. The view then expands as the player emerges onto a broad boulevard, where the billboard is left behind in favor of a vista of illuminated skyscrapers and glass buildings. Finally, the path opens fully to reveal a futuristic cityscape lined with palm trees wrapped in vibrant red neon lights.
